titleStmt.title: SII 31.126: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 126. (A.R. No. B 277 of 1938.) SAMBAṬŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab lying outside Chennakēśava temple.
This undated record can be assigned to the period of Sadāśivadēvarāya both on palaeographical and internal evidences.

Registers the gift of land costing 5 varahas for maintaining the annual boat festivals, 10 varahas of land for maintaining the annual Tirunāḷḷu festival to the god Kēśava Perumāl at Sambaṭūru otherwise known as Śrī Bhāshyapuram by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara China Ōbulayyadēva mahārāja, son of Nandēla Ōbulayyadēvamahārāja. It further records that the Chief offered gift of the prasādam due to him by the temple to Bhōjanampalli Krishṇayyamgaru. The village Chaḍipirala situated in Mulkināṭi-sima of Ghaṇḍikōṭa sīma which is a part of the main terrtorial division Udayagiri chāvaḍi which has been granted to the donor as a nāyaṁkara by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ma
ratnasi
dhi vīsāṁmrājyaṁ cē
cuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara naṁdēla Ōbulayya dēvamahā
rājulayyavāri komāruḍu cina Ō
buḷayyadēvamahārājulugāru saṁ
baṭūrkipratināmamaina śrībhāṣyapuraṁ kēśa
vaperumāḷaku pratisaṁvatsaramaṁdunu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkaṁgānu tirukōnēṭilōnu teppatirunāḷla ma
hātsavaṁ Avadhariṁccē Aṭugānu Ayidu
varahāla kṣētramunnu tiruvadhyayinaṁ tiru
nāḷlu Avadhariṁccē Aṁduku padivarahālakṣa
tramunnu Ubhayamunnu reṁḍu tirunāḷlakunnu
padihēnu varahālakuṁnnu vaccinakṣētraṁ kha�
Akṣarālānu paṁduṁ cēnunnu sadāśivadēva
mahārāyalu māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁ
cina Udayagiri cyāvaḍiki cellēṭi ghaṁḍikōṭa sī
maku cēllē mulikināṭisīmalōnu cadipirēlu
grāmamaṁdu mallinādhuni kālvacēni sdhalāna
nu trivācikaṁgānu sama¨rpiṁstimi . yi reṁḍu ti
runāḷlalōnuṁnnu perumāḷlu Āragiṁcinapra
sādālalōnu māku vacina viṭa¨rvaviṭukālu
bhōjanavalli kṛṣṇayyaṁgārki sama¨rpiṁstimi
ganakavāru Āviṭa¨rva viṭukālu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkaṁgā Anubhaviṁpa galavāru
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
Digital edition of SII 31.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
